name: Maple Walnut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a small saucepan.
2. Add flour all at once and stir until combined.
3. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is golden brown.
4. Gradually add maple syrup and water, whisking continuously.
5. Continue cooking until thickened. Allow to cool for 10 minutes.
6. Mix in the walnut halves or pieces.
7. Pour the warm filling into the prepared pie shell.
8. Bake at 350°F on the center rack of the oven for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the filling is set and the crust is golden brown.
9. Cool on a wire rack. Decorate with nuts, pastry maple leaves, etc., if desired. Best served with whipped cream.
